feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Clarification on Transport Management for Company Codes and Organizational Structure in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to inquire whether there is a possibility to deactivate, delete, or exclude Company Codes from being transported to other environments.

We have already confirmed our organizational structure, and we would like to avoid transporting the existing Company Codes that are currently incorrect.

In case we create new legal entities / Company Codes, would it be possible to transport only the newly created entities without impacting or transporting the old incorrect Company Codes?

Could you please advise on the recommended approach and feasibility in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Best regards,

entry.title: production order long text
entry.content: How to write production order long text through API?

entry.title: Custom form template assignment for FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE ignored at runtime
entry.content:
Hi,

We have created in test enviroment 2 forms in SAP cloud

YY1_FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICEYY1_FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE_MASTER

Because we have to change the layout of the payment advice form. I've followed the procedures in customizing and even output parameter determination but I always see the same predelivered format. In manage automatic payment -> output items I see always:

New Form with fragment: Payment Advice (FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE)

Could you please let us know?

I've updated also the customizing in SCCUI: 

101184

102313

Could you please support us?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Generate 1 cheque from multiple payment document with same supplier
entry.content: My case is that I have multiple supplier invoices for the same supplier, and the system creates multiple payment documents. However, I would like to generate only one cheque for all invoices. Is this possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and how can I achieve it?

entry.title: Requirement to Display IM Storage Bin in Production Order Component Pick List
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I have a requirement to display the IM storage bin field in the Production Order Component Pick List form, as shown in the attached screenshot (Storage Bin field). requirement in order component level. Raw material maintained in IM storage bin this bin filed should appear in Production pick list

Could you please confirm the corresponding CDS view and the relevant business context for this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? This will help us understand the correct and supported approach for implementing the storage bin in the pick list output.

Thank you for your support.

Best Regards,
Kiran

entry.title: Integrating SII for Spain with SAP DRC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are currently submitting VAT-relevant information to the Spanish tax authorities using SII, and we would like to integrate this process with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

We performed all the integration steps according to the SAP Help Portal and tested by submitting an invoice to the test environment of the tax authorities, but got the following error: You need to define the result for process ESSIIBUN step DRCC_RESP first (EDOCPROCSETFLAG). (screenshot below)

We think that it means that we have to configure incoming messages from external systems, but we are not sure how to configure this. Does anyone know why this error occurs and how to resolve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Unable to Post TRM Flows Due to Missing Payment Blocking Indicator for Customer Line Items
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are currently implementing an internal loan process in the Treasury Management module in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

For this scenario, a financial transaction was created successfully and settled using the settlement function. In the payment conditions, under the control section, the option “Posting to Customer” was selected.

However, during the “Post Flows” step, the posting cannot be completed because the system requests a payment blocking indicator for the customer line items related to the generated payment request.

In the on-premise version of SAP, we found a related configuration setting for this issue. However, we could not find an equivalent configuration activity or SSCUI in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Could you please advise whether there is an equivalent configuration in Public Cloud or what the recommended approach/workaround would be to resolve this issue?

We have attached screenshots of the error message, the related transaction settings, and the corresponding on-premise configuration for reference.

Thank you for your support.

 

Best regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Alternative G/L Account description not displayed in Trial Balance / Balance Sheet reports
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Alternative G/L Account description is not displayed for certain accounts in reports such as:

Trial Balance
Balance Sheet/Income Statement – Multidimensional

The Alternative G/L Account number itself is visible, but the description field is blank for some accounts while other accounts display descriptions correctly.

This may create the impression of inconsistent system behavior.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Practice System: Fresh Start Option for Repeated Learner Sessions
entry.content:
Hi SAP Learning Community,

My name is Rejoice Jones, and I'm the Founder at Vower. We're currently evaluating the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud practice system for our learners and appreciate the information you've shared so far.

Question:

Once a learner has purchased access to the practice system, are they able to repeat the exercises  multiple times with a clean slate each session? Specifically, we'd like to confirm whether the system can be reset on demand (or reverts automatically) so that entries and data from previous practice sessions don't carry over.

This is important to us because repetition is a key part of how our learners build proficiency. Being able to work through each exercise from a fresh starting point, rather than continuing from where they left off, would allow them to reinforce the steps, identify gaps in their understanding, and gain confidence before applying the skills in a live environment.

Could you let me know if this is supported, and if so, how learners would initiate a reset?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: CDS level bifurcation between FI Invoice and MM Invoice
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

As park and post facility is not available through App FB60 (Create incoming invoices) so we are doing this through app create supplier invoice. This calling MIRO in the background the same T code is also getting called in time of invoice posting with PO. We need to have bifurcation of these 2 transaction in customized program and report. The reference transaction is also updated as RMRP for both the cases.

As I can see the only difference is that the PO number is getting updated in the invoices in GR/IR line item if this is getting posted through the PO number and the PO is not getting updated in the line items if this is purely FI transactions as this is not possible to find the PO in each line item of the transaction to identify if this is a FI accounting or MM accounting.

Please help us to understand if and other CDS is getting impacted in both the cases with some different values so that we can identify and get it checked if this is through FI route or MM route.

Please help in this regards.

entry.title: Automatic Purchase order generate during MIGO posting
entry.content:
Business requirement:(SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud)

Multiple materials will be received daily from different vendors (suppliers) per production requirements. The user will not get sufficient time to create a purchase order every day and process it further. So they are directly accepting the material. 

So in the back end, the purchase order should be created automatically once the GRN is posted.

  • Pre-requisite:
    • Standard Purchasing Org assignment with Plant.
    • Automatic PO flag at movement type (Missing in Public Cloud)
    • The material master Auto PO flag should be checked.
    • Supplier master Auto PO flag should be checked.
    • Purchase Info record must be maintained.
    • Goods receipt
      • Transaction: Goods receipt
      • Reference: Other
      • Movement type: 101/501.
  • Result:
    • The purchase order should be created automatically.

entry.title: not able to add item cat subcontracting
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

unfortunatlely by mistake i have deleted subcontracting item category in po i am not able to add it again in the PO

entry.title: We need to delete Serializing procedures (POSL Serial Numbers in Purchase Orders)
entry.content: We created a custom serial number profile with reference to the standard profile and assigned it to production materials. However, during PO creation, the system is asking for serial numbers. The business requirement is to capture serial numbers only at the time of GRN. Therefore, we need to remove the relevant procedure from the serial number profile.

entry.title: We need to delete Serializing procedures (POSL Serial Numbers in Purchase Orders)
entry.content: We created a custom serial number profile with reference to the standard profile and assigned it to production materials. However, during PO creation, the system is asking for serial numbers. The business requirement is to capture serial numbers only at the time of GRN. Therefore, we need to remove the relevant procedure from the serial number profile.

entry.title: S/4HANA Systems Time Zone
entry.content:
Good morning

Dear SAP Team

We need to adjust the time zone of the S/4HANA systems to the Madrid, Spain time zone.

Thank you very much

Regards

Zaida

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud – VAT Declaration Gaps
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm trying to set up the VAT declaration for Morocco using the Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Purchases report in S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I'm facing three issues:

1. Missing fields in the Input/Output tax layout Some fields required by the Moroccan tax authority are not available in the field catalog .

2. Deferred tax not supported for MA When I enable Select Deferred Tax, I get this error: "Selection of deferred tax is not permitted for country/region MA"

3. XML / DME File not editable in Public Cloud The standard XML output structure used for the VAT return (DME framework:  CZ_EVAT_XML) is not editable in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Any insights or experience sharing would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Need Help in MM configuration
entry.content:
We are streamlining the NPD (New Product Development) process in the system against the Project/WBS structure. Once the Sales Order is created, the MRP run is executed against the Sales Order, and STO PRs are generated accordingly.

Now, we require the Purchase Requisitions generated through MRP for STOs to be created with:

  • Account Assignment Category: “P” (WBS Element)
  • Item Category: “U” (Stock Transfer)

Kindly assist us with the required system configuration/settings to enable the above functionality.

entry.title: Provision to Edit Warehouse Tasks During Multi-Bin Stock Transfer Process
entry.content:
qty. editable while selecting 1qty. non editable while multiple selectionHi Team,

I would like to understand whether there is any functionality or alternative tile available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud similar to the ADHOC-HU process in SAP HANA.

Currently, I am following the below process:

  1. Open the Warehouse Monitor tile.
  2. Select warehouse location TA00.
  3. Navigate to:
    Stock and Bin → Available Stock
  4. Select the required storage bin(s) and create a Warehouse Task.

Observed Behavior:

  • When I select a single storage bin, the system allows me to manually edit and specify the required quantity before creating the Warehouse Task.
    (Attached in Screenshot 1)
  • However, when I select multiple storage bins together, the system does not provide the option to edit the quantity. Instead, it automatically considers and moves the full available quantity from all the selected bins.
    (Attached in Screenshot 2)

In SAP HAN

entry.title: Even after reversing the payment, it still appears in the approver's list.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently using an approval process for bank payments.

Once a user completes an automated payment, the corresponding payment batch is forwarded to an approver.

The approver reviews the payment details and approves the batch.

Sometimes, users cancel a payment before it has been approved.

The batches associated with such reversed payments continue to appear in the approval queue; furthermore, when an approver attempts to approve them, they do not receive any error messages or warnings.

How can an approver identify the batches containing payments that have already been cancelled while reviewing the approval queue?

I have attached a screenshot for your reference.

Thank you,

DNR

entry.title: Criar Ordem de fornecimento gratuito via API
entry.content:
Eu preciso criar uma ordem de fornecimento via api(VA01), já estou conseguindo criar, consultar e editar, porem tem dois campos específicos que preciso preencher e não consigo, o campo fica dentro do item, na aba pais, em Dds.fiscais adicionais, os campos são Trans.empresarial e Utiliz.cliente.

Já pesquisei e li toda a documentação e não consegui nem ler essas dados via API nem criar eles preenchidos.
